title: Sky's Placeables
description: A mod that lets you place Vanilla items on the ground as custom-made 3D models! [Forge & Fabric]
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2dbfa04ccbb6a9fbb3c106951e0f1b60ec0fe5e.png)

# ✨ Basic Information:

Placeables introduces a new way of displaying your items! Read more about these items below, currently featuring 98 completed items and 1 new block, with more additions in each update!

# 💻 Controls:

- Shift + Right-click to place down an item. 

- Shift + Right-click on an item rotates it. (You can't rotate food items using this method!)

- Right-clicking on an item drops it. (Different with food items!)

- If an item is stackable, right-clicking on an already placed item with the same item in hand will stack them.

- Right-click on a food item to eat it.

- Shift + Right-click on a food item drops it on the ground.

# 📥 Mod Support
Starting from version 1.9.1, Placeables requires Cloth Config to work and adds compatibility with the following mods:

### - Items Displayed
### 
### - Supplementaries

# 💎 Currently added items:

## ❇️ Interactable

- Iron ingot: Stackable (up to 6)

- Gold ingot: Stackable (up to 6)

- Copper ingot: Stackable (up to 6)

- Netherite ingot: Stackable (up to 6)

- Brick: Stackable (up to 4)

- Coal: Stackable (up to 4)

- Book: Stackable (up to 4)

- Egg: Stackable (up to 3)

- Diamond: Stackable (up to 3)

- Amethyst: Stackable (up to 3)

- Emerald: Stackable (up to 3)

- Bread: Edible (2 phases, each gives 2.5 food points)

- Golden Apple: Edible (gives 4 food points, Absorption and Regeneration II)

- Cookie: (Edible)

- Clock: (Day and Night cycle)

- Carrot (Stackable, up to 3) (Can be placed inside a basket) (Edible)

- Potato (Stackable, up to 5) (Can be placed inside a basket) (Edible)

- Beetroot (Stackable, up to 2) (Can be placed inside a basket) (Edible)

- Wheat (Stackable, up to 2) (Can be placed inside a basket) (Edible)

- Apple (Stackable, up to 3) (Can be placed inside a basket) (Edible)

- Melon (Stackable, up to 3) (Can be placed inside a basket) (Edible)

- Bowl (Stackable, up to 3)

- Raw Beef (Stackable, up to 3) (Edible)

- Raw Pork (Stackable, up to 3) (Edible)

- Raw Mutton (Stackable, up to 3) (Edible)

- Dried Kelp (Stackable, up to 3) (Edible)

- Mushroom Stew (Edible)

- Beetroot Soup (Edible)

- Cooked Beef (Edible)

- Cooked Pork (Edible)

- Cooked Chicken (Edible)

- Cooked Mutton (Edible)

- Cooked Rabbit (Edible)

- Pumpkin Pie (Edible, 4 phases)

- Milk Bucket (Drinkable, Removes every effect from the player)

# 🔮 New Blocks

- Basket! The Basket is a new block similar to the Item Frame, designed to hold crops in a fancy way! Craft one using this recipe:

![BasketCrafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/193b343b9526e519073ff1b54c86e2626604570f.png)

# 🧑‍💻 Placeables Team

- ItzSkay - Owner, 3D Modeler, Programmer

- Strakes - 3D Modeler

# 💖 Future plans:

We aim to release an update every week, with the goal of adding every item before the next summer. Once all items are completed, we plan to port this mod to Fabric. Additionally, an official wiki will be released soon.


![X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7bb9bb1f3756c0115d6bdf27fd3103e2d57105a.png)
